raw_consumer_statement: I charged a flight for XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year> for the amount of {$150.00}. My flight was cancelled. I asked for a refund at the airport. I was told to call in. I called repeatedly through XXXX. They do not have live agents. I used the link I was sent by the airline. The link didnt work. I disputed the charge XX/XX/year>. Citi denied the dispute citing a credit received from the airline. Under DOT flight refund policy, I am entitled to a refund and do not have to accept the flight credit. I did not accept the flight credit and want my money back as guaranteed under federal law.
